name: my-holiday-club
description: My Holiday Club - Full Stack Ecommerce Platform

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:admin"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names 'API,WEB,ADMIN' --prefix-colors 'blue,green,yellow' "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:admin"
